# Conformance fixture attribution

The selected GFM Markdown inputs in `../conformance.test.ts` are adapted from
`test/extensions.txt` at commit
`587a12bb54d95ac37241377e6ddc93ea0e45439b` in
[`github/cmark-gfm`](https://github.com/github/cmark-gfm). The GFM specification
is based on the CommonMark specification by John MacFarlane and is licensed
under [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/).

The full CommonMark 0.31.2 test inputs are loaded from the pinned
`commonmark-spec` development dependency, which carries the same CC BY-SA 4.0
license and its own license file.
